description: KernelSage 历史作品清单。每个条目对应一个待采集的源码仓库。

repos.name: rCore-Tutorial-v3
repos.note: 比赛 Rust 系作品的主要教学基线，几乎所有 RCore 变体的源头。

repos.name: uCore OS Lab
repos.note: C 系作品的主要教学基线，UCore 变体的源头。

repos.name: xv6-riscv
repos.note: 极简 Unix 风格教学内核，许多 OS 课程使用，作为对照基线。

repos.name: zCore
repos.note: Zircon-like 微内核风格的 Rust 内核，做异构对照样本。

repos.name: ArceOS
repos.note: 模块化 Unikernel/Monolithic 双模运行的 Rust 内核，比赛中常见的现代基线。

repos.name: rCore-Tutorial-Book-v3 (sample app/doc-aligned code)
repos.note: rCore-Tutorial-v3 配套讲义，含 OS 概念叙述文本，可作为描述参考语料。

repos.name: OSKernel2024-HFUT666
repos.note: 2024 OS contest public repository; added as a real contest-case comparison sample.

repos.name: OSKernel2024-aabcb
repos.note: 2024 OS contest public repository; added as a real contest-case comparison sample.

repos.name: OSKernel2024-NQOS
repos.note: 2024 OS contest public repository; added as a real contest-case comparison sample.

repos.name: OSKernel2024-ouye
repos.note: 2024 OS contest public repository; added as a real contest-case comparison sample.

repos.name: Moca-Mola proj207 new-os
repos.note: 2024 功能赛道一等奖作品，赛题 proj207，实现一个简易操作系统；获奖信息来自官方提供的 os-funtion-winners.md。

repos.name: HUSTer proj306 Rust OS for framekernel architecture
repos.note: 2024 功能赛道一等奖作品，赛题 proj306，基于框内核架构的 Rust OS 实践与创新；获奖信息来自官方提供的 os-funtion-winners.md。

repos.name: Tangram proj226 kernel components frameworks
repos.note: 2024 功能赛道一等奖作品，赛题 proj226，灵活组合的操作系统模块和框架；获奖信息来自官方提供的 os-funtion-winners.md。

repos.name: xv6-public
repos.note: Classic x86 xv6 baseline; complements xv6-riscv for architecture comparison.

repos.name: os-tutorial
repos.note: Small x86 C/ASM tutorial kernel; useful for minimal boot, interrupt and driver evidence.

repos.name: Little Kernel
repos.note: Embedded kernel baseline covering ARM/x86/RISC-V style code and driver-oriented structure.

repos.name: FreeRTOS-Kernel
repos.note: RTOS baseline for scheduling, synchronization and portability comparison.

repos.name: Tock
repos.note: Rust embedded microkernel baseline; expands coverage beyond teaching kernels.

repos.name: seL4
repos.note: Microkernel baseline for IPC, scheduling, architecture and capability-style comparisons.

repos.name: IncludeOS
repos.note: C++ unikernel baseline; helps compare componentized single-address-space OS designs.

repos.name: Redox Kernel
repos.note: Rust microkernel-style baseline; complements rCore and Tock with desktop-oriented design.
